content.speakerText: I'll be out next week, so can you cover my client calls?
content.speakerTextCn: 我下周不在，你能帮我接客户电话吗？

options.text: Sure, I'll take over. Just update the tracker.
I'm busy, maybe someone else can do it.
Can you handle my emails instead?
I don't know how to answer client calls.

content.explanation: 正确答案回应了请求并提出明确的后续动作（更新跟踪表），体现了协作精神。选项2推卸责任，选项3转移任务，选项4表达能力不足，都不符合职场积极交接的语境。

content.speakerText: I'll leave all files in the shared folder and update the status.
content.speakerTextCn: 我会把文件放共享文件夹，更新状态。

options.text: Why are you doing it so late?
I'll do it myself when I get back.
You didn't need to do that.

content.explanation: 正确答案表达感激并认可对方的主动准备。选项2带有指责语气，选项3否定交接意义，选项4轻视对方努力，均不符合职场积极沟通原则。

content.speakerText: I'm leaving for a two-week trip. Can you manage the weekly reports while I'm away?
content.speakerTextCn: 我要出差两周，我走期间你能负责每周的报告吗？

options.text: Of course. Can you share the template and deadline reminders?
I'm not sure I can do it right.
I'll do it, but I need a bonus.

content.explanation: 正确答案接受任务并请求必要资料，体现专业性和主动性。选项2缺乏信心，选项3推卸责任，选项4索要报酬，都不符合职场交接的协作文化。
